options.label_zh: 全平台通用（风格平衡/适配面广/稳妥耐用）
options.prompt_hint_en: balanced cross-platform commercial presentation, visually clean, conversion-friendly, and not overly specialized for any single marketplace

options.label_zh: 淘宝/天猫（视觉抢眼/氛围浓/转化导向）
options.prompt_hint_en: taobao-oriented commercial presentation with stronger visual attraction, denser selling-point hierarchy, richer decorative support, and a more expressive conversion-focused layout rhythm

options.label_zh: 京东（理性专业/参数清晰/信任感强）
options.prompt_hint_en: jd-oriented presentation with clear specification hierarchy, professional trust cues, structured information blocks, and a rational product-detail emphasis

options.label_zh: 亚马逊（海外极简/白底清爽/信息清晰）
options.prompt_hint_en: amazon-oriented presentation with cleaner structure, restrained decoration, white or light-neutral background preference, high clarity, trust-driven hierarchy, and export-safe commercial legibility

options.label_zh: 小红书（生活方式/种草氛围/编辑感强）
options.prompt_hint_en: xiaohongshu-oriented presentation with lifestyle storytelling, tasteful editorial composition, approachable atmosphere, and trend-aware visual softness rather than aggressive hard selling

options.label_zh: 抖音/TikTok（开屏抓眼/节奏快/冲击感强）
options.prompt_hint_en: tiktok-oriented presentation with hook-first composition, stronger first-screen impact, sharper focal hierarchy, fast visual rhythm, and highly scroll-stopping commercial energy

options.label_zh: 拼多多（促销吸睛/信息直给/成交优先）
options.prompt_hint_en: pinduoduo-oriented presentation with direct value communication, stronger promotion visibility, bolder attention capture, and a practical conversion-first layout approach

options.label_zh: 独立站（品牌叙事/高级质感/品牌氛围）
options.prompt_hint_en: shopify-oriented presentation with stronger brand identity, cleaner premium layout, curated visual storytelling, and a more independent-brand editorial commercial tone

options.label_zh: 智能匹配（自动推荐/整体更稳）
options.prompt_hint_en: adaptive commercial style chosen from product category, platform preference, and product temperament; keep the result balanced, conversion-oriented, and visually coherent

options.label_zh: 极简编辑感（大留白/克制简洁）
options.prompt_hint_en: minimalist editorial commercial layout, generous negative space, restrained decoration, clean geometry, crisp product focus, and premium everyday polish

options.label_zh: 高端奢感（精致光感/仪式氛围）
options.prompt_hint_en: premium luxury commercial aesthetic with refined composition, controlled highlights, elegant material reflections, and a high-value beauty or jewelry campaign atmosphere

options.label_zh: 轻奢极简（高级留白/精致材质/低调贵感）
options.prompt_hint_en: luxury minimal commercial style with premium whitespace, refined materials, restrained highlights, and understated high-end elegance

options.label_zh: 自然有机（清新治愈/柔和光感）
options.prompt_hint_en: natural organic commercial style with soft daylight, breathable composition, botanical cues, organic textures, and a fresh wellness-oriented feeling

options.label_zh: 温馨生活感（居家暖调/亲和场景）
options.prompt_hint_en: warm lifestyle commercial style with cozy ambient lighting, home-like textures, approachable composition, and an inviting, emotionally friendly tone

options.label_zh: 柔和编辑生活风（轻编辑感/柔光/生活方式）
options.prompt_hint_en: soft editorial lifestyle commercial style with gentle editorial composition, soft lighting, airy spacing, and warm lifestyle storytelling

options.label_zh: 现代科技感（冷调精密/理性质感）
options.prompt_hint_en: modern tech commercial style with cool-toned lighting, precise structure, engineered spacing, premium industrial materials, and a rational future-facing mood

options.label_zh: 动感活力风（速度张力/年轻能量）
options.prompt_hint_en: dynamic energetic commercial style with directional composition, youthful momentum, punchy contrast, and high visual rhythm without becoming chaotic

options.label_zh: 专业洁净风（洁净明亮/专业可信）
options.prompt_hint_en: professional clean commercial style with hygienic brightness, low-noise background, strong legibility, scientific credibility, and highly trustworthy presentation

options.label_zh: 清透美妆商业风（干净通透/精致肤感/高级克制）
options.prompt_hint_en: clean beauty commercial style with bright clean lighting, refined skin-like softness, polished beauty textures, and restrained premium composition

options.label_zh: 杂志编辑感（高级版式/留白感）
options.prompt_hint_en: editorial magazine commercial style with art-directed composition, premium whitespace, deliberate cropping, and strong headline hierarchy

options.label_zh: 图形海报风（视觉冲击/大字标题）
options.prompt_hint_en: bold graphic poster style with oversized visual blocks, strong silhouette separation, decisive hierarchy, and immediate first-screen impact

options.label_zh: 时尚大片感（质感光影/高级氛围）
options.prompt_hint_en: fashion campaign commercial style with elevated art direction, dramatic tonal control, premium staging, and aspirational brand-led atmosphere

options.label_zh: 可爱趣味风（轻松活泼/亲和可爱）
options.prompt_hint_en: cute playful commercial style with cheerful color rhythm, soft rounded visual language, friendly energy, and clean delightful product presentation

options.label_zh: 复古潮流风（怀旧纹理/个性氛围）
options.prompt_hint_en: retro trendy commercial style with nostalgic color logic, expressive texture accents, and a vintage-meets-modern fashionable personality

options.label_zh: 工业精密风（工程感/结构拆解）
options.prompt_hint_en: industrial precision commercial style with technical composition, structural clarity, engineering-oriented detail emphasis, and exacting product presentation

options.label_zh: 商品主色延展（自动提取/整体统一）
options.prompt_hint_en: extract the dominant palette from the product itself, keep color continuity with the product body, and ensure the overall composition feels naturally unified

options.label_zh: 浅色通透（明亮清爽/轻盈通透）
options.prompt_hint_en: light and bright commercial palette with airy highlights, clean whites or soft neutrals, fresh visibility, and a transparent polished feeling

options.label_zh: 深色高级（沉稳浓郁/层次更深）
options.prompt_hint_en: dark moody palette with deep tonal base, controlled highlights, premium shadow depth, and a sophisticated low-key atmosphere

options.label_zh: 温暖暖调（柔和亲和/生活感强）
options.prompt_hint_en: warm-toned palette with creamy highlights, soft amber or beige warmth, inviting emotional tone, and comfortable commercial friendliness

options.label_zh: 冷调专业（理性清爽/科技感强）
options.prompt_hint_en: cool-toned palette with restrained blues or cool grays, precise visual temperature, rational atmosphere, and a clean technology-oriented impression

options.label_zh: 高对比冲击（反差强烈/更吸睛）
options.prompt_hint_en: high-contrast palette with strong separation between light and dark areas, sharper focal impact, and bolder first-screen visual punch

options.label_zh: 柔和低饱和（高级柔和/克制耐看）
options.prompt_hint_en: soft muted palette with lowered saturation, gentle tonal transitions, refined calmness, and an understated premium lifestyle mood

options.label_zh: 奶油米白（柔和干净/暖白生活感）
options.prompt_hint_en: cream beige palette with soft warm whites, gentle beige undertones, clean lifestyle atmosphere, and cozy premium softness

options.label_zh: 黑金高级（深色奢感/金属点缀/对比强）
options.prompt_hint_en: black and gold palette with deep dark base, metallic golden highlights, luxury contrast, and premium dramatic elegance

options.label_zh: 银灰冷调（银灰科技感/理性精密）
options.prompt_hint_en: silver gray palette with cool metallic neutrals, precise technical atmosphere, clean highlights, and refined industrial clarity
